title: Update lichen-oscore deps for zeroize on hmac/hkdf/sha2/aes
description: Add zeroize features to Cargo.toml to enable ZeroizeOnDrop on owned state in SHA, HMAC, HKDF, AES. Update any wrappers in lichen-crypto (or create if missing) or in oscore/edhoc. Add compile-time assertions for types implementing ZeroizeOnDrop where used. Extend tests for zeroization. After changes run 3 independent codereview passes using review commands. Fix ALL findings. Close only after all done and 3 clean passes.
